testcase.name: WrongLoginUser

failure.message: expected [Warning: No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password.] but found [Warning: Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Warning: No match for E-Mail Address and/or Password.] but found [Warning: Your account has exceeded allowed number of login attempts. Please try again in 1 hour.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at testcase.name: invalidSearch

failure.message: Parameter 'invalidName' is required by @Test on method invalidSearch but has not been marked @Optional or defined in C:\Users\Jerishwin Joseph\AppData\Local\Temp\testng-eclipse--1836442873\testng-customsuite.xml
